mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.permission_name, p.permission_code, p.permission_type, p.parent_id, p.path, p.component, p.icon, p.sort_order, p.status, p.create_time, p.update_time FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_dept_permission dp ON p.id = dp.permission_id WHERE dp.department_id = #{departmentId} AND p.status = 1 AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.sort_order

SELECT id, permission_name, permission_code, permission_type, parent_id, path, component, icon, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_permission WHERE permission_type = 1 AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT id, permission_name, permission_code, permission_type, parent_id, path, component, icon, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_permission WHERE permission_type = 2 AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT id, permission_name, permission_code, permission_type, parent_id, path, component, icon, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_permission WHERE permission_type = 1 AND parent_id = 0 AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order
